title: T-057 — schema-runtime VITEST env-var elimination (pool injection)
prompt:
# T-057 — schema-runtime VITEST env-var elimination

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §6 (Schema-driven foundation, ADR-028)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-carry-forward-backlog.md` CF-17
Severity: P1 (test concern leaks into production code)

## Goal
Eliminate the `process.env.VITEST` schema-routing branch in `packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts` by replacing it with explicit pool injection (`_setPool(pool, schema)` / `_clearPool()` underscore-prefixed test seams). Production behavior (default `"Reference"` schema, LRU cache keyed on `${orgId}:${schemaVersion}`) is unchanged.

## Implementation contract
In `packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts`:
1. Remove every `process.env.VITEST` reference and any `if (process.env.VITEST) ...` branch that switches schema name.
2. Add module-private `let _injectedPool: Pool | null = null` and `let _injectedSchema: string | null = null`.
3. Export `export function _setPool(pool: Pool, schema?: string): void` and `export function _clearPool(): void` — underscore prefix marks them as test-only seams.
4. The `compile()` function uses `_injectedPool ?? defaultPool()` and `_injectedSchema ?? 'Reference'` as resolution order.
5. Migrate the existing test in `packages/schema-runtime/src/__tests__/compile.test.ts` to call `_setPool(testPool, 'Reference_test')` in `beforeAll` and `_clearPool()` in `afterAll`.

If T-055 has not yet landed an ESLint rule against `process.env.VITEST`, this task does NOT add one (out of scope); it only removes the existing references.

After the refactor, the LRU cache key remains `${orgId}:${schemaVersion}` (do not include schema name in the key — the injected schema is global per process for tests).

## Files (scope)
- packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts [modify]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/__tests__/compile.test.ts [modify — use _setPool/_clearPool]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/index.ts [modify — re-export _setPool / _clearPool with underscore prefix preserved]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given refactored compile.ts, when grep VITEST runs, then zero matches; AND Given production code paths, when compile() runs without _setPool, then it queries Reference.
2. Given _setPool(testPool, 'Reference_test'), when compile() runs, then queries hit Reference_test.
3. Given _clearPool(), when compile() runs, then it falls back to Reference.
4. Given the migrated test, when pnpm test runs, then all tests pass with zero regressions; AND Given the LRU cache, when compile(orgA, v1) is called twice, then the second call hits the cache.
## Test strategy
- RED: extend `compile.test.ts` to add a test that asserts `_setPool` reroutes queries to a mock pool (using a vi.fn-based fake Pool) BEFORE removing `process.env.VITEST` from compile.ts.
- Run `grep -n VITEST packages/schema-runtime/src/` and assert zero matches after GREEN.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/schema-runtime test` to confirm no regressions.

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT change the LRU cache key shape (`${orgId}:${schemaVersion}`).
- Do NOT change the public `compile()` signature.
- Do NOT export `_setPool` / `_clearPool` without the underscore prefix (signals test-only).
- Do NOT add new dependencies; reuse the existing `pg` Pool type.
- Do NOT touch other packages.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED _setPool test before VITEST removal) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Replace process.env.VITEST schema routing in compile.ts with explicit _setPool/_clearPool test seams; production default schema remains 'Reference'.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Remove every process.env.VITEST reference and branch from compile.ts; add module-private _injectedPool / _injectedSchema; export _setPool(pool, schema?) and _clearPool(); migrate existing tests to use these seams; LRU cache key shape unchanged.

AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
